item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 4min Dan Skelton on his handicap successes
'For me, it's all about planning, I love plannin
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 4min Dan Skelton on his handicap successes
'For me, it's all about planning, I love planning and I'm not afraid to admit that, but I don't plan because I'm a devious b******
People talk about plotting and targets but that's my job. A horse can generally only peak once a season, Mostrar más Cita Racing Post @RacingPost · 1h THE BIG READ
'Perception doesn't bother me - I don't care what people think. If you don't like it, you don't like it - I've not done anything wrong'
Read more with RacingPost+
https:// racingpost.com/news/features/ the-big-read/people-talk-about-plotting-and-targets-but-thats-my-job-its-not-because-im-devious-abYvJ8G03kFL/ … 1 mil

item.title: AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 14min There was a home-trained winner of the Scottish Champion Hurdle when Dedicated Hero sho
item.description: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 14min There was a home-trained winner of the Scottish Champion Hurdle when Dedicated Hero shone for Sandy Thomson earlier today De attheraces.com 1 mil
